title: Fiery Indian Rice Biryani
description: A vibrant, spicy vegan biryani made with fragrant jasmine rice and a medley of vegetables, perfect for a single-serving feast.
instructions: Wash the jasmine rice until the water runs clear and soak for 15 minutes. Drain and set aside.
In a saucepan, bring 3 cups of water to a boil. Add the soaked rice, reduce heat, cover, and cook for 6 minutes. Remove from heat and keep covered for 10 minutes to steam; fluff with a fork.
Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for 30 seconds before adding sliced onions. Cook until onions are translucent, about 4 minutes.

Add diced carrots and frozen peas, sautéing for 3 minutes. Stir in diced tomatoes, garam masala, coriander powder, turmeric, and chili powder. Cook for another 2 minutes, allowing the spices to bloom.
Pour the cooked rice into the skillet, gently folding it into the vegetable mixture. Season with salt to taste and stir gently to combine all flavors.
Transfer the rice mixture to a heatproof bowl, cover with foil, and let it steam for 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with chopped fresh cilantro for added freshness.
Enjoy your fiery, fluffy vegan biryani!
